channel.title: German Economic Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in German Economic Review

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: The 25th Anniversary of the German Economic Review 2.0

item.title: New Data Frontiers in German Economic History
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0094

item.title: Demographic Data for the Pre-Statistical Age (Late Sixteenth Century to 1870)
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0064

item.title: Measuring Historical Inequality in Germany
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0060

item.title: Causes of German Inventiveness, 1815–1990. What We Can Learn from Patent Statistics
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0063

item.title: The Universe of Germany’s Foreign Trade Prior to World War I
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0059

item.title: Data Sources on the 19th and Early 20th Century German Capital Market: Challenges and Opportunities
item.description: Article by Sibylle Lehmann-Hasemeyer, Alexander Opitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ger-2024-0067
